```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Negative binomial distribution.
# Packages
library(ggplot2)

# Plot
ggplot2::ggplot(data.frame(x = c(0, 20)), aes(x)) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dnbinom, args = list(size = 5, prob = 0.5), geom = "col",
    aes(fill = "r=5, p=0.5"), alpha = 0.7, n = 21
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dnbinom, args = list(size = 10, prob = 0.5), geom = "col",
    aes(fill = "r=10, p=0.5"), alpha = 0.7, n = 21
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dnbinom, args = list(size = 5, prob = 0.3), geom = "col",
    aes(fill = "r=5, p=0.3"), alpha = 0.7, n = 21
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(fill = "Parameters") +
  ggplot2::ylab("Probability") +
  ggplot2::xlab("x") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
